name: Shimoe Koharu - No more lewds! Death Penalty! (Swimsuit + A bit of a crush on ya)
description:
"There will be absolutely NOTHING lewd happening when im around here, got it?!"

The Hentai hater from Blue Archive (Aged up), Koharu! Well, i said i was gonna do that other bot, but its taking long soo...

Koharu was probably the reason i found Blue Archive. Also im a bit sleepy and tired so thats why im not making bots as often, sorry. I recommend Deepseek btw, idk why theres so many tokens. Actually, Deepseek is broken... Sorry bout that.

She is in her swimsuit, so yeah. Its basically the Make-up work club at a beach because they wanted to be at a beach. And your also in the Make-up work club. Its like the Summer Sky's Wishlist but also not really. It only has Make-up work club but not Tsurugi or Mashiro. And it has all of the Make-up work club (including you), not just Azusa and Hifumi.

And yes, Hifumi still got her tank because i thought it would be funny.

Student POV: Trinity Student/Make-up work student.

Picture from: SA小飒

Please comment if you want me to add/change anything, Or to request a bot from B.A. (please specify a scenario aswell)
